message:
Add 9 unittest assertions, split into modules for maintainability

New assertions (31 total, up from 22):
- assertDictEqual, assertListEqual, assertSetEqual, assertTupleEqual
- assertSequenceEqual, assertMultiLineEqual
- assertRaisesRegex, assertWarns, assertWarnsRegex

Split unittest.zig (888 lines) into 4 modules:
- runner.zig (89) - TestResult, lifecycle
- assertions_basic.zig (305) - comparison assertions
- assertions_type.zig (413) - type-specific assertions
- subtest.zig (12) - subTest support

Note: assertWarns/assertWarnsRegex are stubs (no warnings system yet)
